integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Moodle web interface to create events.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Moodle application, clicking buttons, and filling out forms.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing database insertions, curl commands, or PHP scripts being executed to create the events.

integrity.description: The screenshots show genuine interaction with the event creation forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing into the event creation fields and saving them, rather than using browser developer tools to alter text on the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: Course 'Introduction to Biology' has shortname 'BIO101'. Event 1: 'Guest Lecture: Genetics and Medicine', 2025-09-15 10:00 AM, 120 mins (ends 12:00 PM). Event 2: 'Midterm Lab Practical', 2025-10-20 09:00 AM, 180 mins (ends 12:00 PM). Event 3: 'Field Trip: University Botanical Garden', 2025-11-10 08:00 AM, 360 mins (ends 02:00 PM). All must be Course events for BIO101.
